TargetName: Install steel plates in concrete floor at strategic locations for tracked/packer heavy equipment
Statement: DEL-011-02 implements SOW-0024 per decomposition scope ledger and Datasheet Identification
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in Decomposition §7 PKG-011 and §8 Scope Ledger. SOW-0024 maps exclusively to DEL-011-02.

TargetName: Deliver a code-compliant, fully functional maintenance shop addition
Statement: DEL-011-02 supports OBJ-001 per decomposition and Datasheet Identification
Notes: FACT. Confirmed in Decomposition §7 PKG-011: DEL-011-02 Supports OBJ = OBJ-001.

Statement: IFC structural drawings (DEL-002-08) must be issued by structural engineer before installation commences
EvidenceQuote: DEL-002-08 (Steel Plate Embedment Plan, IFC) issued by structural engineer, P.Eng.-stamped, and approved for construction
Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-01. Also referenced in Specification REQ-011-02-01 and REQ-011-02-02. Critical gating dependency — all plate dimensions and anchorage details derive from this deliverable.

Statement: DEL-002-12 must be issued and reviewed for material grades and welding/anchorage standards and installer qualifications
EvidenceQuote: DEL-002-12 (Structural Specification) issued and reviewed — confirms material grades, welding requirements, anchorage standards
Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-02. Also referenced in Specification REQ-011-02-04 and REQ-011-02-08. Governs material grade selection and welding acceptance criteria.

Statement: DEL-002-10 must be issued for design load values and load rating basis
EvidenceQuote: DEL-002-10 (Structural Calculation Package) issued — confirms design loads and load rating basis
Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-03. Also referenced in Specification REQ-011-02-03. Provides equipment load compatibility values.

Statement: Concrete slab formwork and reinforcing steel must be in place and ready for steel plate placement prior to pour; construction schedule coordination required
EvidenceQuote: Installation of steel plate embedments shall not commence until... slab formwork and reinforcing steel are in place
Notes: FACT. Explicitly stated in Specification REQ-011-02-07, Procedure P-05, and Guidance Principle 3. Cast-in-place method (ASSUMPTION) makes this a critical construction interface — plates must be placed before the slab pour.

Statement: Building permit and Safety Code Permits must be obtained before construction commences
EvidenceQuote: Building permit and Safety Code Permits obtained by General Contractor
Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-04. Source: RFP R-01 S3.3.2.

Statement: Scope boundary clarification needed: wash bay steel plate band locations must not conflict with floor drain locations in DEL-018-05
SourceRef: Scope > Included > Scope boundary — wash bay
EvidenceQuote: wash bay scope boundary with SOW-0027a... and SOW-0027b... requires confirmation
Notes: FACT. Stated in Specification Scope boundary and Guidance CON-011-02-03. Scope overlap between wash bay steel plates (SOW-0024) and wash bay drainage (SOW-0027b, DEL-018-05) requires confirmation.

Statement: Scope boundary clarification needed: wash bay steel plate scope may overlap with wash bay structural enclosure scope (SOW-0027a)
EvidenceQuote: DEL-027a (Wash Bay Enclosure, PKG-011) and DEL-018-05... may have overlapping scope
Notes: FACT. Stated in Guidance CON-011-02-03. SOW-0027a includes 'steel plate floor' in wash bay enclosure scope description (Decomposition §3), creating potential overlap with SOW-0024 steel plates.

Statement: Equipment installation on embedments depends on completed steel plate embedments; embedments provide bearing surface for downstream equipment operations
EvidenceQuote: The downstream consumer is PKG-012 (Interior Construction and Fit-Out) and ultimately the equipment operations program
Notes: FACT. Stated in Guidance Purpose and Specification Excluded. Also declared in _DEPENDENCIES.md.

Statement: RFP R-01 is the primary requirements source defining the steel plate embedment scope (S3.4) and construction/permit obligations (S3.3.2)
Notes: FACT. R-01 is the primary source document. Referenced throughout all deliverable documents.

Statement: Appendix B conceptual floor plan provides approximate steel plate band locations and bay dimensions; required as reference input for construction
EvidenceQuote: Appendix B floor plan (R-04) shows several parallel steel plate bands running transversely across the repair bay floor area
Notes: FACT. R-04 provides the only visual reference for plate locations pending DEL-002-08 issuance.
